exceptions.nextAction: Upload missing release document and re-run release check.

exceptions.reason: Source and destination weights differ beyond tolerance.
exceptions.nextAction: Open variance review and confirm accepted tons.

exceptions.reason: Delivered tons are lower than dispatched tons.
exceptions.nextAction: Open short-delivery claim and adjust accepted tons.

exceptions.reason: Counterparty dispute has been opened against the parcel.
exceptions.nextAction: Hold payout and await dispute outcome.

exceptions.reason: Manual finance approval is required before export.
exceptions.nextAction: Finance manager must approve export release.
